title: ranunculus incompletus
intro: Ranunculus incompletus, also known as lesser clematis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus incompletus are attributed to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating colds, sore throats, and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
